creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Hi,

In CPAN/modules/by-module/IO/, the link to
../../../authors/id/S/SU/SULLR/IO-Socket-SSL-1.38.tar.gz is missing.
Before jadawin@ commits the fix, you may download
http://search.cpan.org/CPAN/authors/id/S/SU/SULLR/IO-Socket-SSL-1.38.tar.gz
manually.
Thanks.

Regards,
--=20
